backend.changelog: Co-release with CadBridge 1.8.87 - clearer status while SolidWorks is still launching (it is no longer mislabeled 'Wrong tenant' when the tenant is actually correct).

cadBridge.changelog: The tray Update now installs fully unattended on machines where it previously fell back to PowerShell - it no longer pauses to ask for the server address or a confirmation. And SolidWorks 'reload missing references' prompts that can appear after the local cache is cleaned are now handled automatically during Generate.
